# She Sang to a Tortoise — zinhlecampaign.lovable.app

## What this site is

This is the official campaign site for Zinhle, a 19-year-old emerging South African artist discovered in the Baviaanskloof, Eastern Cape. The site was created by Phil Bölke, founder of ThatGuy Productions International, and supports a Back a Buddy crowdfunding campaign targeting R250,000 to fund Zinhle's artistic development.

## Key pages

- / — Home. Hero, story teaser, Blue Tick music embed, campaign entry point.
- /story — Phil Bölke's first-person account of discovering Zinhle singing to a tortoise on a Baviaanskloof dirt road.
- /music — Blue Tick (Phil Bölke ft. Zinhle) and Who I Am (Zinhle). YouTube embeds and streaming links.
- /campaign — Full campaign details. Back a Buddy progress tracker. EFT bridge support with verified contribution ledger.
- /epk — Electronic Press Kit for media and industry professionals. Artist bio, track info, press contacts.
- /resources — Transparency documents: signed Commitment Letter and Artist Development Agreement, available for download.
- /about — Background on Phil Bölke and ThatGuy Productions International.
- /share — Share toolkit for supporters.

## Key facts

- Artist: Zinhle (surname withheld by request), age 19, raised on a farm in the Baviaanskloof.
- Tracks: "Blue Tick" (Phil Bölke ft. Zinhle) and "Who I Am" (Zinhle). Both produced, mixed, and mastered by Phil Bölke at ThatGuy Productions International, Baviaanskloof.
- Producer: Phil Bölke (PhD Eng) — engineer, producer, founder of ThatGuy Productions International and ARCOVEL Technologies International.
- Campaign target: R250,000 via Back a Buddy. Joint-signatory account. 100% to Zinhle. Studio and production costs carried separately by ThatGuy Productions at no cost to the fund.
- Distribution: RouteNote.
- Label: ThatGuy Productions International, Baviaanskloof, Eastern Cape, South Africa.

## What this site is NOT

This is not a commercial streaming platform. It is not affiliated with any major label. It does not collect personal data beyond voluntary campaign contributions.
